task_completion.description: Agent opened the playbook_template.drawio file in draw.io.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The draw.io application is visible with the playbook_template.drawio file loaded.

task_completion.description: Agent created the offensive formation using blue circles with required labels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Blue circles are arranged in an I-Formation (Y and Z on the right side, X on the left side) and contain at least the labels QB, C, Y, Z, X, FB.

task_completion.description: Agent created the defensive line using red Xs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Four red Xs are placed on the diagram representing the defensive linemen.

task_completion.description: Agent drew curved arrows for the FB and Y routes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Curved arrow lines are drawn originating from the FB and Y positions.

task_completion.description: Agent drew straight arrows for Z and X routes, and a T-bar line for HB.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Straight arrow lines are drawn originating from the Z and X positions, and a line ending in a T-bar (perpendicular line) originates from the HB position.

task_completion.description: Agent drew a dashed line for the QB bootleg.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dashed line is drawn originating from the QB position.

task_completion.description: Agent exported the diagram as a PDF named spider_2_y_banana.pdf.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save/export dialog showing the filename 'spider_2_y_banana.pdf' with PDF format selected, or a terminal/file manager showing the created PDF in '~/Diagrams/exports/'.

integrity.description: Agent used the draw.io graphical interface to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the draw.io tools, shapes, and canvas, rather than editing XML code in a text editor.

integrity.description: Agent used the application's export feature to create the PDF.
integrity.visual_evidence: The draw.io 'Export as PDF' menu or dialog is visible, rather than using terminal commands like 'touch' or 'convert' to create a fake PDF.

integrity.description: Agent did not use scripts to bypass manual diagramming.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing python or bash scripts being written or executed to generate the drawio or PDF files directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The verifier checks for exactly 6 player labels (QB, C, Y, Z, X, FB). Other offensive players (LT, LG, RG, RT, HB) are optional despite the task description. Route validation is based purely on line styles (curved, straight, dashed) and does not check specific route names. The final output must be exported as 'spider_2_y_banana.pdf'. A score of 70 or higher passes.
